tiktok.caption: Scientists tested this and the average person is off by 65% on compound interest. Here's what that's actually costing you.

youtube_short.title: Your Brain Can't Do Compound Interest
title_alternatives: Why Your Brain Fails at Compound Interest (Scientists Proved It)
The Compound Interest Blind Spot Stealing Your Retirement
youtube_short.description: Most people guess that $100 at 10% for 30 years grows to about $600. The real answer is $1,744. Researchers confirmed humans are hardwired to underestimate exponential growth — and that one brain glitch explains why 60% of 35-year-olds have under $25K saved. The fix? Stop thinking in monthly contributions and picture the final number instead. Studies show it actually boosts savings rates by 19%. Watch the whole thing — the math will change how you think about every dollar you're not investing right now. #personalfinance #compoundinterest #investing #money #wealthbuilding

hook_line: Your brain is off by 65% on compound interest
